# Self-Improvement Tasks — ~/.claude Configuration

## Should fix (Warning)

- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — add `"Bash(pytest:*)"`. Template has
  go/dotnet/pip-install/npm but no pytest, so a Python autonomous run's test gate
  (mandated by testing.md) stalls and stops the run.
- [ ] `settings.json` (global) — add `"Bash(go:*)"` and `"Bash(dotnet:*)"`. project-init.sh
  detects Go/.NET and the csharp/jdtls LSPs are enabled, but every interactive build prompts.
- [ ] `skills/analytics-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/auth-setup/SKILL.md` — add a Step-0 resume
  check + progress file (match the pattern in payments-setup/testing-setup). Both are
  14-15-step secret/DB-touching skills with no resumability. NOTE: the 2026-06-09 task file
  marked auth-setup resumable, but grep confirms it never landed — re-verify on implement.
- [ ] `skills/i18n-setup/SKILL.md` — add an Operational Readiness section (SLI/failure
  modes/rollback) and a test for the `PATCH /api/me/language` endpoint it ships.
- [ ] `skills/self-improve/SKILL.md:791` — Phase 3 Opus routing lacks an explicit conciseness
  constraint. Fix: append "Return only the deduplicated scored list — no preamble" (per
  arxiv:2604.00025, Opus over-elaborates without it).
- [ ] `rules/autonomous-execution.md:43-55` — "After Every Compaction" near-duplicates the
  "Startup Sequence" (:32-41), with a 3rd copy at post-compact-context.md:6-15. Collapse
  :43-55 to: "Same as Startup Sequence, but re-read from disk — do not trust summarized
  context."
- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` (agent-prompt-structure section) — add one line stating that
  subagents must Read the files named in an agent's "Required Rules" (they don't auto-load
  rules/); otherwise the filename+gloss is ambiguous about whether the gloss is authoritative.

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

- [ ] `rules/autonomous-execution.md:~156-166` — commit-format full spec is restated; collapse
  to a pointer to commits.md. (CLAUDE.md:57's summary+pointer is fine — leave it.)
- [ ] `agents/**` (~11 files, e.g. `backend-developer.md:4`) — `tools:` lists non-existent tool
  names (Docker, database, redis, postgresql, terraform, kubectl, figma) that Claude Code
  silently ignores. Replace with `Bash`; the agents already shell out to the CLIs.
- [ ] `.mcp.json` — add the `playwright` MCP server (currently only in user-scope
  `~/.claude.json`, so it isn't version-controlled with the config). Optionally scope it to a
  browser-test subagent to keep its tool descriptions out of every main-session context.
- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — set `"fallbackModel": "sonnet"` (and consider
  `availableModels`/`enforceAvailableModels`). Prevents a hard stop on Opus overload during
  long autonomous runs.
- [ ] `agents/**` — add `effort:` frontmatter to planning/architecture/security agents
  (currently ~3/126 set it) per the parallelism.md per-role guidance.
- [ ] `hooks/session-start.sh:32` — `sudo apt-get install -y ast-grep` (gated behind
  CLAUDE_AUTO_INSTALL_TOOLS) uses sudo in a hook, contradicting the PreToolUse sudo-block and
  able to hang non-interactively. Drop sudo / require manual install / document the gate.
- [ ] `rules/observability.md` ("Cannot define SLI? Feature not ready — stop") and
  `agents/01-core-development/backend-developer.md:9` ("sub-100ms p95 non-negotiable") — soften
  these false absolutes to per-operation thresholds, consistent with per-op SLO design.
- [ ] `settings.json` — wire a `SubagentStop` hook to auto-run quality gates (and consider
  `Notification`); both events are unused despite heavy subagent/autonomous use.
- [ ] `skills/review-pr/SKILL.md`, `skills/explore/SKILL.md` — add retry on transient gh/network
  5xx per retry-idempotency.md (currently abort).
- [ ] `skills/doc-pdf/SKILL.md`, `skills/doc-docx/SKILL.md` — add post-operation verification and
  a `command -v soffice/pandoc` preflight + timeout on `soffice --headless` (per
  error-handling.md).
- [ ] `skills/auth-setup`, `skills/payments-setup`, `skills/analytics-setup` — add a "verify
  third-party API surface against current docs" step and include WebSearch/WebFetch in
  allowed-tools (OAuth/Stripe/PostHog endpoints drift).
